register.choose_type: E Koho i ke ʻAno Hoʻopaʻa Inoa
register.address_desc: Koʻu hale, keʻena, kauhale — manuahi a wikiwiki no nā mea a pau
register.poi_desc: Nā wahi kaulana, kahua paʻa kaʻa, mākeke — me nā kiʻi (nānā ʻia e ka luna)
register.hotel_desc: Hōkele, hale hoʻokipa, wahi hoʻomaha — no nā mea ʻoihana (nānā ʻokoʻa)
register.photo_guide: 1+ o kēlā me kēia: waho, hale komo, lumi, lumi ʻauʻau, lako
register.address_notice: Hoʻopaʻa inoa koke · Hiki ke huli ma ka honua
register.poi_notice: Paʻi ʻia ma hope o ka nānā ʻana a ka luna (1-3 lā)
register.hotel_notice: E hoʻouna ʻia ka ʻike uku ma ka leka uila ma hope o ka nānā (3-5 lā hana)
register.hotel_pricing_1: Kumu: $99/makahiki — Papa huli + wahi noho WIA Pin Code
register.hotel_pricing_2: Kiʻekiʻe: $299/makahiki — Papa mua + ʻaoʻao kikoʻī + waiho lumi
register.hotel_pricing_note: E hoʻouna ʻia ka ʻike uku ma hope o ka nānā ʻae
register.footer_notice: Hiki i nā mea hoʻohana WIA GIL ma ka honua ke huli i nā wahi i hoʻopaʻa inoa ʻia
register.hotel_panel_note: No nā mea hoʻokele hōkele/hale hoʻokipa/hale hoʻomaha (uku)
register.landmark_panel_note: Hoʻopaʻa me nā kiʻi · E paʻi ʻia ma hope o ka nānā admin
register.transport_panel_note: Nā kūlana kaʻa, nā hale kūʻai, nā awa · E paʻi ʻia ma hope o ka nānā admin

ai_modal.location_tip: E hoʻohana i kēia kī no ka huli ʻana i kēia wahi ma kēlā ao nei!

ai_modal.distance_or_city: A i ʻole me nā inoa kaona:
ai_modal.distance_tip: Hōʻailona Noʻonoʻo: ʻEkolu huahelu mua ʻokoʻa × 200 ≈ mamao (km)
ai_modal.city_prompt: Hoʻokomo inoa kaona no ka loaʻa ʻana o ka ʻike!
ai_modal.reverse_desc: Hoʻokomo 9-huahelu Pin Code e hoʻololi i GPS!
ai_modal.help_try: E hoʻāʻo i kēia mau nīnau:
ai_modal.help_register: No ka loaʻa ʻana o nā pane AI ʻekolu, e hoʻokō i kahi API kī!
ai_modal.tool_summarize:
E hōʻuluʻulu i ka ʻike o kēia ʻaoʻao pūnaewele i loko o nā ʻōlelo 3-5:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_translate:
E unuhi i ka ʻike ma lalo nei i ka ʻōlelo Hawaiʻi:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_question: E hoʻokomo i nā kūlana GPS e hoʻololi i ka WIA Pin Code!
ai_modal.tool_keywords:
E unuhi i nā huaʻōlelo koʻikoʻi 10 mai ka mea ma lalo nei a e wehewehe pōkole i kēlā me kēia:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_explain: Hiki iaʻu ke wehewehe i ka WIA Pin Code, ka YUJIN Transform, a me nā helu mamao. E nīnau mai iaʻu!
ai_modal.tool_chat: Kamaʻilio wale! E nīnau mai iaʻu e pili ana i ka WIA Pin Code.

auth.logged_out: Ua paʻa kou hele ʻana iwaho.

iss.crew_iss: Nā mea hoʻokele lewa ma ke aupuni ISS
iss.crew_unavailable: ʻAʻohe ʻike o nā mea lawelawe.

space.enter_solar: 🪐 E komo i ke Kāleka Kūloko →

minimap.title: Māla ʻĀkau
minimap.goto_solar: 🪐 E komo i ka Kāleka lā →

little_prince.q1: I ka ʻike ʻana i nā hōkū, e noʻonoʻo ana wau i nā hōkū e ʻoluʻolu ana i nā hōkū.
little_prince.q2: Aia nā kanaka kūpuna e makemake i nā helu. I ka ʻōlelo ʻana e pili ana i nā hoa hou, ʻaʻole lākou e nīnau i nā mea koʻikoʻi.
little_prince.q3: He nani ka wahi ʻāina no ka mea e hūnā ana i kahi wai.
little_prince.q4: O nā mea koʻikoʻi, ʻaʻole e ʻike ʻia.
little_prince.q5: O nā manawa i loaʻa iā ʻoe no kāu mau ʻūlū, ʻo ia hoʻi, ua hoʻokumu i ka nani o kāu mau ʻūlū.
little_prince.q6: He ʻano ʻē nā hōkū i nā kanaka. No ka poʻe e hele ana, he alakaʻi ko lākou.
little_prince.q7: O nā mea e hoʻoikaika ana, ʻo ia hoʻi, e loaʻa ana nā pili.
little_prince.q8: O nā kanaka kūpuna, ʻaʻole he nui e hoʻomanaʻo i ka wā i ʻike ʻia ai lākou.
little_prince.q9: O nā keiki wale nō, ʻike lākou i ka mea e ʻimi ana.
little_prince.q10: He mea koʻikoʻi ka poʻe e noho ana i ke ola e ʻimi ana i ka ʻoiaʻiʻo.

sky_explorer.title: Sky Explorer
sky_explorer.subtitle: E lele i ke ao a hoʻāʻo i kāu ʻike
sky_explorer.game_modes_sub: 12 mau ala e ʻike i ke ao mai kāu cockpit
sky_explorer.geoflight_desc: Nīnau wikiwiki - e ʻike i nā kūlana, nā ʻāina, nā kapalakiko, a me nā ʻāina. Leaflet minimap + cockpit HUD + animation lele.
sky_explorer.city_intel_desc: E aʻo i nā ʻike kūlana - nā mokupuni, nā ʻāina, kālā, visa - a laila e pane i nā nīnau hoʻomanaʻo.
sky_explorer.photo_master_desc: E ʻike i kahi kiʻi kūlana mai Wikipedia - e noʻonoʻo i ke kūlana. E hoʻohana i nā hōʻailona ma ke kumukūʻai.
sky_explorer.space_explorer_desc: E noho i loko o ke aupuni. E aʻo e pili ana i nā ʻāina, nā mahina, a me nā ʻano cosmic.
sky_explorer.daily_challenge_desc: He kūlana hoʻokahi, 10 mau nīnau. He paʻakikī hou i kēlā me kēia lā. E kaʻana like i kāu hopena!
sky_explorer.travel_challenge_desc: 3-pili ke koho o nā hōkele. E ʻike i nā kūlana mai nā kiʻi o nā hōkele, e manaʻo i nā kumukūʻai, e pūerto i nā kūlana ma ke ʻāina.
sky_explorer.data_powered_sub: Hoʻokomo ʻia kēlā me kēia nīnau mai nā ʻike o ke ao
sky_explorer.loading: E hoʻoload i nā ʻike lele...
sky_explorer.already_played: Ua pāʻani ʻia i kēia lā
sky_explorer.come_back: E hoʻi mai i nā lā aʻe no ka paʻakikī hou!
sky_explorer.live_sky_desc: Quiz on real flights in the air right now. Identify destinations, origins, aircraft types from live ADS-B data.
sky_explorer.live_ocean_desc: Quiz on real vessels sailing the seas right now. Identify destinations, vessel types, and oceans from live AIS data.
sky_explorer.intel_time_hint: How long to memorize intel data?
sky_explorer.estimated_rate: Ka helu i manaʻo ʻia no ke aʻo?
sky_explorer.no_scores: Aʻohe kākoʻo i kēia manawa. E pāʻani i kekahi ʻano e ʻike i nā huakaʻi maikaʻi!
sky_explorer.currency_master_desc: E hoʻāʻo i kāu ʻike o nā 166 kālā o ke ao me nā kumukūʻai i kēia manawa.
sky_explorer.currency_symbol: He aha ka kālā e hoʻohana ana i kēia hōʻailona?
sky_explorer.rate_compare: He aha ka mea e ʻoi aku ana?
sky_explorer.country_from_currency: He aha ka ʻāina e hoʻohana ana i kēia kālā?
sky_explorer.landmark_master_desc: E ʻike i nā ʻāina kūloko e ʻike ʻia mai nā wahi 10,000+ ma ke ao.
sky_explorer.which_landmark: He aha ka ʻāina kūloko i loko o {city}?
sky_explorer.landmark_in: O nā wahi e noho ana kēia ʻāina kūloko?
sky_explorer.landmark_type_q: He aha ke ʻano o kēia ʻāina kūloko?
sky_explorer.landmark_country: He aha ka ʻāina i loko o kēia ʻāina kūloko?
sky_explorer.loading_landmarks: E hoʻoload i nā ʻāina kūloko...
sky_explorer.world_wonders_desc: Nā mauna ʻike ʻia, nā tunela ma lalo o ke kai, a me nā wahi baloon i ʻike ʻia ma ke ao.
sky_explorer.tunnel_connects: He nā ʻāina e pili ana?
sky_explorer.balloon_where: O nā wahi e noho ana kēia wahi baloon?
sky_explorer.loading_wonders: E hoʻoload i nā Hōʻike ʻĀkau...
sky_explorer.antipode_explorer_desc: He aha ka mea i ke koho ʻē aʻe o ke ʻāina? E hui pū ana ka ʻike o ke ao me nā helu.
sky_explorer.through_earth: I loko o ke ʻāina: 12,742 km
